Carrier: Everest Insurance
Attorney: Associate | Rate: $220/hr | Units: 1.6
Task: L110 - Fact Investigation/Development | Activity: A109 - Appear/attend
Narrative: Attend site inspection at The Zeb apartment complex, located at 1721 Telstar Dr, Colorado Springs, CO 80920 to oversee compaction grouting on northwest end of building 1, area where pergola/retention wall was removed, review of several interior units, and balcony/siding water intrusion and subsequent post-inspection debrief with attorney Jason Reitz (start time 9:45 a.m. and end time 11:29 a.m.)(covering for attorney on file David Andersen)
sentences:
Carrier: Liberty Mutual Insurance
Attorney: Senior Counsel | Rate: $230/hr | Units: 1.6
Task: L250 - Other Written Motions and Submissions | Activity: A103 - Draft/revise
Narrative: In furtherance of the motion in limine authorized by the carrier prepared the required concluding argument, declaration and proposed order for the court. (3 pages)

Carrier: Central Insurance
Attorney: Senior Counsel | Rate: $195/hr | Units: 0.2
Task: L110 - Fact Investigation/Development | Activity: A104 - Review/analyze
Narrative: Conduct analysis and prepare description of IAL_2886 for purposes of developing description for reference in depositions of IAL employees.

Carrier: Everest Insurance
Attorney: Associate | Rate: $255/hr | Units: 0.4
Task: L120 - Analysis/Strategy | Activity: A103 - Draft/revise
Narrative: Meeting with Plaintiff and his father to discuss a possible settlement. During the meeting we presented our position: the settlement needed to be a number below six figures, a number commensurate to the injuries suffered. Plaintiff explained his case was about being wronged, and would not provide a number below six figures. The Plaintiff became increasingly obstinate and angry and refused to continue discussing the matter.
